overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person walk through the historic streets of Saint Denis. The player observes a tram passing by, horse-drawn carriages, and pedestrians in a detailed 19th-century urban environment with cobblestone streets and historic architecture, transitioning into a hazy, sun-drenched industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and utility poles

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the street
tram passes extremely close to camera, temporarily filling the entire frame

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the cobblestone street as a tram approaches and passes by very closely

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving left across the street
large tram approaching and passing within inches of the camera

entered.detail: three-story weathered brick building with green-painted iron balconies and potted plants
stacked wooden barrels and crates outside a storefront entrance
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street surface
tall wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a historic cobblestone street lined with a red brick building featuring green balconies. A horse-drawn carriage crosses the street, followed by a large tram labeled 'Cornwall City Railway' that passes extremely close to the camera, temporarily occluding the view. The street is lined with wooden barrels and utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with tram lines and historic buildings

events.description: moving from narrow street into open intersection with white historic buildings
pedestrians crossing the cobblestone street in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection, passing the tram which is now moving away to the left, and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and dark pants walking across the street
woman with red hat and fan walking alongside the man

entered.detail: large white building with green shutters and ornate balconies dominating the intersection
curved corner building with intricate ironwork balcony on the second floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a sunlit intersection dominated by a large white historic building with green shutters. The tram continues down the left side while pedestrians in period clothing cross the cobblestone street. The scene opens up with full sky visibility and more space between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with parked carts and tram tracks

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the curving street layout
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone street, following the curve of the road and passing wooden carts and carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving away down the street

entered.detail: weathered gray stone buildings with green shutters lining both sides of the street
empty wooden hand carts and wheelbarrows parked along the sidewalk
tall gothic church spire visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a narrower street lined with gray stone buildings and parked wooden carts. The street curves gently to the right, with a church spire visible in the distance. Horse-drawn carriages move along the road, and the tram tracks continue down the center of the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with dust and haze approaching market archway

events.description: entering a dustier section with strong sun glare and atmospheric haze reducing visibility
approaching the large stone archway entrance to the market area

agents.ego_description: walking through a dusty, sun-drenched industrial street toward a prominent stone archway

entered.detail: large stone archway with 'St. Michel Open Daily' signage and lantern fixtures
plain industrial warehouse buildings with fewer windows and more utilitarian architecture

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a hazy, dust-filled street with strong backlighting from the sun. The architecture shifts to industrial warehouses, and the camera approaches a prominent stone archway labeled 'St. Michel.' The atmosphere is thick with dust, and the street appears emptier than previous sections, with abandoned carts and barrels along the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the bustling historic center of Saint Denis that gradually transitions into a hazy, industrial district. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with red brick buildings and green balconies, where a horse-drawn carriage and a large Cornwall City Railway tram pass closely, momentarily occluding the view. As the camera moves into a sunlit intersection, the scene opens up toward a large white building with green shutters and pedestrians crossing the street under a clear sky. The perspective then shifts down a narrower, curving road lined with gray stone buildings and parked wooden carts, passing horse-drawn carriages while a church spire emerges in the distance. Finally, the atmosphere thickens with dust and strong backlighting as the camera enters a quieter industrial area of warehouses, approaching a prominent stone archway labeled St. Michel.
